description: Office shelves: 8 shelves around a corner dihedral, 2 main interlocking verticals (around the dihedral), 2 sinusoidal extra supports.
_glue_tolerance_note: Per-side clearance added to every interfacing tab/slot (total gap = 2x). Slots widen by 2*glue_tolerance; tab protrusions narrow by 2*glue_tolerance.
_analytic_dxf_note: Use exact LWPOLYLINE bulge-encoded arcs instead of polyline approximations. Set false to revert to legacy sampled-arc output.
_vertical_stock_thickness_note: Vertical support stock thickness (separate from shelf stock).

shelf._outer_arc_radius_note: PLACEHOLDER — geometry of the outer 3-arc curve still being clarified.

extra_supports._phase_note: Right and left phases differ by π so the two profiles are inversions; together they tile.

main_supports._tabs_note: Between consecutive shelves the interlock alternates: x-tab, y-tab, x-tab (or y, x, y) at fractions 1/3, 2/3, etc., past stock-thickness extension with dogbone interior corners.

shelves._height_note: shelf 0 at first_height; shelf 1 at second_height_factor*subsequent_separation; shelves 2..6 each 11.625" above PREVIOUS shelf TOP.

right_arm_extension._length_note: Extra length past the right_extra support along the right arm (inches). Set to 0 to disable. Was 18" (1.5 ft) for extended low shelves.
right_arm_extension._height_limit_note: Only extend shelves whose top face is strictly below this height (inches).
